executive_summary: The South African government has announced a R1.5 billion budget for digital transformation initiatives, and Eskom has agreed to a 5-year power tariff with the South African ferrochrome industry. These developments present opportunities for Kgotla AI to offer services in the mining, energy, and government sectors.

top_opportunities.title: Digital Transformation Tender with SITA
top_opportunities.action: Review and prepare a proposal for the SITA RFP for artificial intelligence and machine learning services

top_opportunities.title: Eskom Power Tariff Agreement
top_opportunities.action: Research and explore potential partnerships with Eskom and the ferrochrome industry

top_threats.title: Limited Information on Mining Sector Digitalisation
top_threats.impact: Kgotla AI may miss out on potential opportunities in the mining sector due to lack of information
top_threats.mitigation: Establish relationships with key players in the mining sector to gather more information on digitalisation efforts

recommended_outreach.reason: To discuss the RFP for artificial intelligence and machine learning services and potential partnership opportunities
To explore potential partnerships and opportunities related to the power tariff agreement with the ferrochrome industry
